exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your debt payoff forward
items: List all your debts with current balances, minimum payments, and interest rates
Calculate your total monthly income and fixed expenses to determine available debt payment funds
Research and understand the debt snowball versus debt avalanche methods to choose your payoff strategy
Download and review your free annual credit report from all three credit bureaus
Contact your credit card companies to understand current interest rates, fees, and available hardship programs
Gather and organize all debt statements and financial documents in one secure location
